'''Lwyll''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was in love with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roa]]. Roa proposed [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]] numerous times and was continually rejected unless he retire from smuggling. Finally, Roa decided to retire and Lwyll agreed to marry him—even though everyone in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] of Nar Shaddaa knew they were in love. However, Roa answered the call to arms during the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]], in which he flew a ship called the [[Lwyll (Redthorn-class)|''Lwyll'']], named in her honor. Following the battle, Roa and Lwyll traveled to the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Lwyll was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], and Roa joined the trillions fighting the war to avenge lost loved ones.
